article.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
article.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

headline: Robinhood Launches AI for 24/7 Crypto Trading Support

article.title: Robinhood says its AI agent feature will ‘soon’ be assisting crypto traders
article.summary: More than 70,000 agentic accounts have already been created by Robinhood equities and options traders since late May, when Robinhood launched a beta version of the product.

headline: India, NZ Forge $1B Maritime Security Pact

article.title: India, NZ Plan Strategic Partnership Including Maritime Security
article.summary: India and New Zealand will elevate their relationship to a “strategic partnership,” as both seek closer trade and security ties.

headline: China Stands By North Korea, Risks $1Bn Trade Hit

article.title: Xi Says China’s Backing for Kim and North Korea Won’t Change
article.summary: President Xi Jinping said China’s commitment to its friendship with North Korea, support for Kim Jong Un’s leadership and determination to safeguard the two countries’ common interests “will not change,” Xinhua News Agency reported on Saturday.

headline: US Lawmakers Push Senate on Crypto Bill by July

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod for $1B National Trust Bank

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.

headline: $1B Lawsuit: Apple Targets OpenAI Over Trade Secrets

article.title: Apple Sues OpenAI, Claims Former Employees Stole Trade Secrets
article.summary: Apple alleges former employees took confidential designs, supplier information, and engineering files before joining OpenAI.

headline: Trump's $1B Crypto Gains Spark Senate Probe

article.title: Democrats Call for Senate Hearings on Trump's Massive Crypto Profits
article.summary: Top Democrats on key Senate committees demanded inquiries into the more than $1.2 billion that President Trump made on crypto last year.

headline: CBDC Ban Law Passed Overnight, Crypto Plunges 5%

article.title: Housing bill that includes a CBDC ban passed into law without Trump’s signature
article.summary: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a provision that bans the Fed from issuing a CBDC, has become law.

article.summary: A former contestant on 'The Apprentice' is one of the persons urging the DOJ to drop the charges, the report said.
